articles.title: Ebola outbreak live updates: Flight bound for Detroit diverted to Canada after Congolese passenger boarded 'in error,' U.S. officials say - Yahoo

articles.content: A flight bound for Detroit was diverted to Canada overnight after a passenger from the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) incorrectly boarded the plane amid restrictions in place over the Ebola outbr… [+1666 chars]
